page_metadata.biotools__summary: Automated Augmentation for Domain Generalization (AADG) is a data manipulation based domain generalization method that can sample data augmentation policies that generate domains and diversify the training set from an appropriate search space.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Automated Augmentation for Domain Generalization (AADG) is a data manipulation based domain generalization method that can sample data augmentation policies that generate domains and diversify the training set from an appropriate search space.
